summary: Frontend-only validation of Iter 79j.52a/52b/54a/57c/57d + 3D regression on Red-House estimate 673707d5-9b7e-4d8f-8eaf-63c86820f611. All 5 primary features and the 3D regression PASS.

54a_debug_diff.single_run_scenario_confirmed: Debug modal header shows SINGLE-CALL pill; run_pills=0 in picker (only one graduated run for this estimate)
54a_debug_diff.note: Cannot verify diff panel + amber highlighting without a 2nd run; would require running AI again which was explicitly forbidden by the review request.

52a_dismiss_reconcile_failure.code_review: AIMeasureButton.jsx L2270 shows the dismiss button only renders inside the {runError && ...} banner block, and its onClick invokes dismissRunError() (L~905) which clears runError + run_id.

critical_code_review_comments: AIMeasureButton.jsx is now ~4451 lines — well past the 700-line guideline. The onboarding overlay, rerun confirm, run-error banner, preview panel, 3D tab, and debug integration all live in a single component. Recommend extracting sub-components (OnboardingChecklist, RerunConfirmDialog, RunErrorBanner). Non-blocking.

attemptRerun() at L265 correctly guards the confirm dialog to the done+reconciled case only (checks !ra._reconciliation_error AND walls.length > 0). Failed runs skip the dialog which matches the design intent of not training click-through.

Debug button (L3927) is gated by `showAdvanced && preview`. That's intentional but means testers must set localStorage.aiMeasureShowAdvanced='1' BEFORE the AIMeasureButton component mounts (useState initializer only runs once). Consider re-reading the flag on modal open, or expose a Debug affordance in non-advanced mode.

Diff toggle at AIExtractionDebugModal L562 is inside the run-picker loop — verified only rendered for non-active runs when history has >1 run. Cannot exercise the diff-panel/amber-highlight code path against Red-House (single graduated run) without triggering a second run; recommend a Storybook fixture or a fixture-driven pytest for that path.
seed_data_creation: None. Only localStorage.aiMeasureOnboardingSeen was toggled; no server-side data was mutated. 'Yes, replace' on the Re-run confirm dialog was NOT clicked (per review directive).
context_for_next_testing_agent: The Red-House estimate 673707d5-9b7e-4d8f-8eaf-63c86820f611 currently has exactly one graduated run in history. To exercise the Iter 54a diff panel with amber-highlighted rows against real data, either (a) trigger a second AI run (which will burn the current graduated run and require Phase A+B re-grading) or (b) use a fixture-driven test that stubs the debug runs list with two entries. Onboarding auto-show is now dismissed (aiMeasureOnboardingSeen=1 in browser localStorage after this run) — clear it if re-testing 57c. The Debug button requires localStorage.aiMeasureShowAdvanced='1' before the estimate page mounts; setting it after mount is a no-op because the useState initializer only reads once.
